{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322045610328451C04AE61A0A29E0"}"},"total":1966},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7406892175239725849","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，主角作为一个从末世回来的人，性格很真实。而且没有那种看着不爽的憋屈情节，主角一直都有仇报仇，斩草除根。后面这个过去与未来的设定也很有意思，希望作者能够越写越好。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724553803,"group_id":"7355401876658981912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5wdF0scXVNl1wR/zNSLrpgSSu7T/8mZE0CUULySbVVv","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/beac0500245d4fc99db7279b70a316bf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709855&x-signature=CmRHUhT3Bq0%2Bc3UtpSA%2FKYmdMq0%3D","user_id":"2419340200389115","user_name":"月色初晨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2419340200389115","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1700318331,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7355401876658981912","book_info":{"abstract":"【已签约实体书，请放心食用】
【腐泥怪】——【憎恶巨人】——【燃血圣徒】
【小冰龙】——【霜寒领主】——【霜耀骨龙】
【引魂幡】——【招魂幡】——【人皇旗】
钱尔穿越御兽世界，成了一个黑暗系御兽师，可因为没有资源而进境困难。
幸好觉醒末世双穿门，可以穿越到末世世界中用丧尸血肉喂养血肉系御兽，骨骼喂养骷髅系御兽，灵魂喂养亡魂系御兽。
最重要的是末世收割丧尸居然还会产生功德。
一众黑暗系御兽师看着钱尔身后人头滚滚，但却没有丝毫鬼气反而金光护体的御兽人皇旗陷入沉思。
这东西……怎么这么像万魂幡啊？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e2af18ca8720ba0ecb7d019daf300223","author":"九十七","author_id":"","book_id":"7355401876658981912","book_name":"末世御兽：主打一个不浪费","book_short_name":"末日御兽","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7355403411136725528","read_count":"31947","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1345888"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"655","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,末世,宠物","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/64ec9ad3fb8d084fee3f6459b8a817b4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779310570&x-signature=tEjemb%2FtsP7IVZQg9oT5sfULldc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1107947579249796","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"205"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322045610328451C04AE61A0A29E0"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14863,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":25987},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":fa
